title: vaccinium myrtillus var. yatabei
intro: Vaccinium myrtillus var. yatabei, also known as Yatabe's blueberry, is a variant of the bilberry plant (Vaccinium myrtillus) native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vaccinium myrtillus var. yatabei include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Vaccinium myrtillus var. yatabei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
